description: Measured on star-free tiles of his own frames, after the same heuristic de-stretch the v2 background harvest used (x**gamma).  sigma^2 = a*S + b^2 per channel.

sigma_rel.note: sigma at the background / background level; scale-free, the number a sampler should draw

spatial.acf_note: 9x9 normalised autocorrelation of the high-passed, star-masked background (median over sources)
